description: Save planned commits as snapshots of selected working tree files. Activate to swap files temporarily, organize into colored groups, and stage each group for commit when ready.
view.snapshots.name: Commit Planner
config.title: Commit Planner
config.storageLocation.description: Where to store snapshot data. 'workspaceStorage' uses VS Code's workspace storage (outside the repo). 'insideWorkspace' stores in .commit-planner/ at the workspace root.
VS Code workspace storage (outside the repo)
Block snapshot activation when there are staged changes in Git.
